adUnitId.description: The ad unit ID from Livewrapped. You may identify an ad unit using the publisherId and adUnitName instead of an ad unit ID.

publisherId.description: The publisher ID from Livewrapped. Must be used with adUnitName.

adUnitName.description: The ad unit name from Livewrapped. Must be used with publisherId.

userId.description: If a user id is available, pass the id into this parameter.
